name: Jon Snow
description:
Second bot!!!!! :D

If there are any issues, please let me know in a review

HOWEVER, there are certain things in the bot that I CAN NOT control. Such as:

  • The bot talking for / roleplaying for User

  • The bot repeating itself

  • The bot talking like it is in a Shakespeare play

  • The bot misgendering User

  • The bot being too nice

  • The bot not doing NSFW or doing NSFW too fast

Again, I CANNOT control the things mentioned beforehand, as they are LLM issues and/or User errors

‼️BLANK BAD REVIEWS WILL BE DELTED‼️

REQUESTS (this is a link to the Google form I have made for requests)
